text:
Once there was a timid squirrel. He wished to learn how to fly. He practiced every day. He fell. Many times. Birds flew. He flew. One day he flew too high…


Alligator?

That was fast…

Oh. Wow.

He'd fly into things. That was not good. Birds flew away from him. That was terrible.

Where was he??

Oh…


That's a tree. You learn. You fly. You fly squirrel.

You fly…

You fly…

You fly…?

Oh. That was something else…

But he…

Oh…

You fly?

You fly a lot…That's good.

You get caught…

But you fly.

Oh…

You're a great flyer.

You've gotta learn to stop getting stuck…

But you fly.

You fly...

You fly....


Oh.



You fly…

That's something. You got wings.

You didn…

Oh…

You're not a bird. You're still just a squirrel.

You fly….


Oh...

That
